findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal via HTTP request parameters to file system operations
 * @description User-controlled input from HTTP requests flows to file system operations without proper validation
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/path-traversal-http-to-fs
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module PathTraversalConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("get") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Paths") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileInputStream") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileOutputStream") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileReader") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
  }
}

module PathTraversalFlow = TaintTracking::Global<PathTraversalConfig>;
import PathTraversalFlow::PathGraph

from PathTraversalFlow::PathNode source, PathTraversalFlow::PathNode sink
where PathTraversalFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from $@.", source.getNode(), "user input"
findings.hypothesis: Remote user input flows directly to file system operations (File, Paths.get, FileInputStream) without path validation

message.text:
Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from [user input](1).
Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from [user input](2).
Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from [user input](3).
Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from [user input](4).
Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from [user input](5).
Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from [user input](6).
Path traversal: user input flows to file system operation from [user input](7).

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal in log file access via remote commands
 * @description Log file paths from remote commands flow to file operations without validation
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/log-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module LogPathConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
    or
    // Log request commands deserialized from network
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getPath") and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
    or
    // From log view request commands
    exists(FieldAccess fa |
      fa.getField().getName().toLowerCase().matches("%path%") and
      fa.getField().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Log%Request%") and
      source.asExpr() = fa
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileInputStream") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("get") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Paths") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "RandomAccessFile") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
  }
}

module LogPathFlow = TaintTracking::Global<LogPathConfig>;
import LogPathFlow::PathGraph

from LogPathFlow::PathNode source, LogPathFlow::PathNode sink
where LogPathFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Log path traversal: path from $@ flows to file operation.", source.getNode(), "remote source"
findings.hypothesis: Log file paths from remote commands (ViewLogRequest, RollViewLogRequest) flow to file system operations without path validation - known CVE pattern in DolphinScheduler

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Log path traversal in LoggerRequestProcessor - no path validation
 * @description Log file paths received via network commands are used without validation
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-request-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module LoggerPathConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Source: path field from log request commands received from network
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().getName().matches("getPath") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Log%") and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
    or
    exists(FieldAccess fa |
      fa.getField().getName() = "path" and
      fa.getField().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Log%Command%") and
      source.asExpr() = fa
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileInputStream") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "RandomAccessFile") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("get") and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Paths") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }
}

module LoggerPathFlow = TaintTracking::Global<LoggerPathConfig>;
import LoggerPathFlow::PathGraph

from LoggerPathFlow::PathNode source, LoggerPathFlow::PathNode sink
where LoggerPathFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Log path from $@ flows to file operation without validation.", source.getNode(), "log command path field"
findings.hypothesis: Log request command path fields (ViewLogRequest, RollViewLogRequest, GetLogBytesRequest) flow to file operations without path traversal validation

message.text:
Log path from [log command path field](1) flows to file operation without validation.
Log path from [log command path field](2) flows to file operation without validation.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal in LoggerRequestProcessor - network path to file
 * @description LoggerRequestProcessor handles network requests with file paths that are not validated
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-request-processor-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module LoggerReqProcConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Source: deserializing log request commands from JSON
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().getName() = "parseObject" and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("com.alibaba.fastjson", "JSON") and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().getName() = "readValue" or mc.getMethod().getName() = "parseObject") and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
    or
    // Source: any getPath() or path field access in log command classes
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().getName() = "getPath" and
      source.asExpr() = mc and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Logger%Processor%")
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      (cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileInputStream") or
       cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "RandomAccessFile")) and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
  }
}

module LoggerReqProcFlow = TaintTracking::Global<LoggerReqProcConfig>;
import LoggerReqProcFlow::PathGraph

from LoggerReqProcFlow::PathNode source, LoggerReqProcFlow::PathNode sink
where LoggerReqProcFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "LoggerRequestProcessor path traversal: data from $@ flows to file.", source.getNode(), "network deserialized source"
findings.hypothesis: LoggerRequestProcessor deserializes log request commands and uses path fields to access files without validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name LoggerRequestProcessor path traversal - startsWith without canonicalization
 * @description The LoggerRequestProcessor checks path containment with startsWith but doesn't canonicalize first
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-processor-startswith-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 *       external/cwe/cwe-706
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module LoggerProcConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Network-received log request commands decoded from bytes
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().getName() = "decode" or mc.getMethod().getName() = "deserialize") and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%LoggerRequest%") and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
    or
    // Path field from network-received log command
    exists(FieldAccess fa |
      fa.getField().getName() = "path" and
      fa.getField().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Log%RequestCommand") and
      source.asExpr() = fa
    )
    or
    // getPath() calls on log request commands
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().getName() = "getPath" and
      mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Log%Command") and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0) and
      cie.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Logger%Processor%")
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      (cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "RandomAccessFile") or
       cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileInputStream")) and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    // Reading file bytes
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("readFileToByteArray") and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }
}

module LoggerProcFlow = TaintTracking::Global<LoggerProcConfig>;
import LoggerProcFlow::PathGraph

from LoggerProcFlow::PathNode source, LoggerProcFlow::PathNode sink
where LoggerProcFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Log command path from $@ reaches file operation in LoggerRequestProcessor.", source.getNode(), "network command"
findings.hypothesis: LoggerRequestProcessor receives log paths from network commands and uses String.startsWith to check if path starts with log base dir, but doesn't canonicalize first - path traversal bypass with ../ sequences

message.text:
Log command path from [network command](1) reaches file operation in LoggerRequestProcessor.
Log command path from [network command](2) reaches file operation in LoggerRequestProcessor.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Missing path canonicalization in LoggerRequestProcessor before startsWith check
 * @description Identifies the exact startsWith check in LoggerRequestProcessor that lacks canonicalization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-processor-no-canonicalize
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall startsWithCall, Method enclosingMethod, RefType declaringType
where
  startsWithCall.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
  enclosingMethod = startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable() and
  declaringType = enclosingMethod.getDeclaringType() and
  declaringType.getName().matches("%Logger%Processor%") and
  // No canonicalization call in the same method
  not exists(MethodCall canon |
    canon.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosingMethod and
    (canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("getAbsolutePath"))
  )
select startsWithCall,
  "In " + declaringType.getName() + "." + enclosingMethod.getName() +
  "(): path containment uses startsWith without canonicalization - traversal bypass possible with ../ sequences"
findings.hypothesis: Exact location of missing canonicalization before startsWith path check in LoggerRequestProcessor

message.text: In LoggerRequestProcessor.checkPathSecurity(): path containment uses startsWith without canonicalization - traversal bypass possible with ../ sequences

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name LoggerRequestProcessor checkPathSecurity method analysis
 * @description Checks if checkPathSecurity uses startsWith without canonicalization and how paths flow
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-checkpathsecurity-analysis
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find the checkPathSecurity method and its startsWith call
from Method m, MethodCall startsWithCall, Parameter pathParam
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getName() = "LoggerRequestProcessor" and
  m.getName() = "checkPathSecurity" and
  startsWithCall.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  startsWithCall.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
  pathParam = m.getAParameter() and
  DataFlow::localFlow(DataFlow::parameterNode(pathParam), DataFlow::exprNode(startsWithCall.getQualifier()))
select startsWithCall,
  "checkPathSecurity() at line " + startsWithCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " uses startsWith on parameter '" + pathParam.getName() + 
  "' without prior getCanonicalPath() - attackers can use '" + pathParam.getName() + 
  "=/base/../../../etc/passwd' to bypass this check"
findings.hypothesis: Confirm that checkPathSecurity() accepts a path parameter and directly applies startsWith without getCanonicalPath()

message.text: checkPathSecurity() at line 150 uses startsWith on parameter 'path' without prior getCanonicalPath() - attackers can use 'path=/base/../../../etc/passwd' to bypass this check

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name LoggerRequestProcessor process() - path not canonicalized before file read
 * @description process() in LoggerRequestProcessor calls checkPathSecurity() but the check itself is bypassable
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-processor-process-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 *       external/cwe/cwe-706
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module ProcessMethodConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // path parameter to the process() or handler methods in LoggerRequestProcessor
    exists(Parameter p |
      p.getCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "LoggerRequestProcessor" and
      (p.getType().hasName("String") or p.getType().getName().matches("%Command%")) and
      source.asParameter() = p
    )
    or
    // getPath() from deserialized command in LoggerRequestProcessor
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().hasName("getPath") and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "LoggerRequestProcessor" and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("readLines") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("tail") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("readFileToByteArray") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("readFileToString")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument() and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "LoggerRequestProcessor"
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      (cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") or
       cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "RandomAccessFile")) and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0) and
      cie.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "LoggerRequestProcessor"
    )
  }
}

module ProcessMethodFlow = TaintTracking::Global<ProcessMethodConfig>;
import ProcessMethodFlow::PathGraph

from ProcessMethodFlow::PathNode source, ProcessMethodFlow::PathNode sink
where ProcessMethodFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Path from $@ flows to file operation in LoggerRequestProcessor.process().", source.getNode(), "log request path"
findings.hypothesis: LoggerRequestProcessor.process() reads path from deserialized command, calls bypassable checkPathSecurity(), then passes path to file operations

message.text: Path from [log request path](1) flows to file operation in LoggerRequestProcessor.process().

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTTP request path flows to local file system in downloadLocalResource
 * @description HTTP resource name flows to file access in ResourcesServiceImpl.downloadLocalResource
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/resources-download-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 *       external/cwe/cwe-073
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module DownloadConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    // Sinks: file-related operations in ResourcesServiceImpl
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("copyFile") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("readFileToByteArray") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("writeByteArrayToFile") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("write") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("copy")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileInputStream") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
  }

  predicate isBarrier(DataFlow::Node node) {
    // Block flows through getCanonicalPath or toRealPath (proper canonicalization)
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath")) and
      node.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }
}

module DownloadFlow = TaintTracking::Global<DownloadConfig>;
import DownloadFlow::PathGraph

from DownloadFlow::PathNode source, DownloadFlow::PathNode sink
where DownloadFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
  and (
    sink.getNode().getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "ResourcesServiceImpl"
    or sink.getNode().getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() = "FileUtils"
  )
select sink.getNode(), source, sink,
  "Path traversal: HTTP input from $@ reaches file operation in " +
  sink.getNode().getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." +
  sink.getNode().getEnclosingCallable().getName() + "()",
  source.getNode(), "HTTP request"
findings.hypothesis: ResourcesServiceImpl.downloadLocalResource() uses HTTP-supplied resource name/path to construct local file paths without adequate canonicalization

message.text: Path traversal: HTTP input from [HTTP request](1) reaches file operation in ResourcesServiceImpl.updateResource()

Path traversal: HTTP input from [HTTP request](1) reaches file operation in FileUtils.writeContent2File()
Path traversal: HTTP input from [HTTP request](2) reaches file operation in FileUtils.writeContent2File()

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Summary of all path traversal sinks reached from HTTP input
 * @description Enumerate all distinct file operation sinks reachable from HTTP input
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/path-traversal-summary
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module SummaryConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      (cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") or
       cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileInputStream") or
       cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "FileOutputStream") or
       cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "RandomAccessFile")) and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0)
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("get") and
       mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.nio.file", "Paths")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
    or
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("writeContent2File") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("directoryTraversal") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("readFileToByteArray") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("writeByteArrayToFile")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }

  predicate isBarrier(DataFlow::Node node) {
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath")) and
      node.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }
}

module SummaryFlow = TaintTracking::Global<SummaryConfig>;

from DataFlow::Node source, DataFlow::Node sink
where SummaryFlow::flow(source, sink)
select sink,
  "Path traversal sink reachable from HTTP input in " +
  sink.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." +
  sink.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + "() at line " +
  sink.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Enumerate all path traversal sinks reachable from HTTP input without canonicalization barriers

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal via LoggerController queryLog endpoint
 * @description Log file paths from HTTP API requests reach file system without proper containment check
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-controller-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.FlowSources

module LoggerControllerConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    // Sinks in LoggerServiceImpl or LogClientService
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      mc.getMethod().getName().matches("queryLog%") or
      mc.getMethod().getName().matches("getLog%") or
      mc.getMethod().getName().matches("rollViewLog%") or
      mc.getMethod().getName().matches("viewLog%") |
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument() and
      mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Logger%")
    )
    or
    exists(ClassInstanceExpr cie |
      cie.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
      sink.asExpr() = cie.getArgument(0) and
      cie.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName().matches("%Log%")
    )
  }
}

module LoggerControllerFlow = TaintTracking::Global<LoggerControllerConfig>;
import LoggerControllerFlow::PathGraph

from LoggerControllerFlow::PathNode source, LoggerControllerFlow::PathNode sink
where LoggerControllerFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Logger HTTP path traversal from $@ to log service.", source.getNode(), "HTTP input"
findings.hypothesis: HTTP API request parameters in LoggerController reach file operations in logger service without path validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path validation using startsWith without canonicalization
 * @description Checks if any path containment relies on startsWith without prior canonicalization/normalization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/path-startswith-no-canon
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 *       external/cwe/cwe-706
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall startsWithCall, Variable pathVar
where
  startsWithCall.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
  startsWithCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String") and
  // The qualifier involves a path variable
  DataFlow::localFlow(DataFlow::exprNode(pathVar.getAnAccess()), DataFlow::exprNode(startsWithCall.getQualifier())) and
  pathVar.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%path%") and
  // No canonicalization was applied to this variable
  not exists(MethodCall canon, VarAccess varAccess |
    varAccess.getVariable() = pathVar and
    (canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("normalize")) and
    DataFlow::localFlow(DataFlow::exprNode(varAccess), DataFlow::exprNode(canon.getQualifier()))
  )
select startsWithCall, "Path containment check using startsWith on '" + pathVar.getName() + "' without prior path canonicalization - path traversal bypass possible."
findings.hypothesis: Path containment checks use String.startsWith without first canonicalizing the path, making them bypassable with ../ sequences

message.text: Path containment check using startsWith on 'path' without prior path canonicalization - path traversal bypass possible.
Path containment check using startsWith on 'path' without prior path canonicalization - path traversal bypass possible.
Path containment check using startsWith on 'path' without prior path canonicalization - path traversal bypass possible.
Path containment check using startsWith on 'path' without prior path canonicalization - path traversal bypass possible.
Path containment check using startsWith on 'path' without prior path canonicalization - path traversal bypass possible.
Path containment check using startsWith on 'serverPath' without prior path canonicalization - path traversal bypass possible.

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name LoggerServiceImpl file access with HTTP-supplied path
 * @description LoggerServiceImpl uses HTTP-supplied log path to access files without validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/logger-service-file-access
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find file access operations in LoggerServiceImpl
from Method m, Expr fileOrMethodExpr
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getName() = "LoggerServiceImpl" and
  (
    (fileOrMethodExpr.(ClassInstanceExpr).getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
     fileOrMethodExpr.getEnclosingCallable() = m)
    or
    (fileOrMethodExpr.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("queryLog") and
     fileOrMethodExpr.getEnclosingCallable() = m)
    or
    (fileOrMethodExpr.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("readLines") and
     fileOrMethodExpr.getEnclosingCallable() = m)
    or
    (fileOrMethodExpr.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("rollViewLog") and
     fileOrMethodExpr.getEnclosingCallable() = m)
  ) and
  not exists(MethodCall canon |
    canon.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("normalize"))
  )
select fileOrMethodExpr, "File/log access in LoggerServiceImpl." + m.getName() + "() at line " + fileOrMethodExpr.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - no path canonicalization"
findings.hypothesis: LoggerServiceImpl has file access operations without path canonicalization, making it vulnerable to path traversal from HTTP log query requests

message.text: File/log access in LoggerServiceImpl.queryLog() at line 108 - no path canonicalization
File/log access in LoggerServiceImpl.queryLog() at line 160 - no path canonicalization
File/log access in LoggerServiceImpl.queryLog() at line 231 - no path canonicalization
